series.title: 해광그룹 막내아들
series.author: 해광 화물운송
series.summary: 해광그룹 막내아들 박종찬(36). 형들의 음모로 하루아침에 빈털터리! 1톤 트럭 한 대로 화물 밑바닥부터 다시 정상까지, 핸들로 통쾌하게 갚아준다. (AI 작화 웹툰)
series.poster:
<svg viewBox='0 0 300 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs>
<linearGradient id='sky' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#0b1733'/><stop offset='55%' stop-color='#21407e'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0a1020'/></linearGradient>
<linearGradient id='road' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#3a3f4d'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#15181f'/></linearGradient>
<linearGradient id='gold' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ffe79a'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#d4a017'/></linearGradient>
<radialGradient id='glow' cx='50%' cy='38%' r='60%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#3b63b8' stop-opacity='.7'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0b1733' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient>
</defs>
<rect width='300' height='400' fill='url(#sky)'/>
<rect width='300' height='400' fill='url(#glow)'/>
<!-- 도시 스카이라인 -->
<g fill='#16294f' opacity='.85'>
<rect x='8' y='150' width='34' height='110'/><rect x='48' y='120' width='28' height='140'/><rect x='82' y='160' width='24' height='100'/><rect x='196' y='135' width='30' height='125'/><rect x='232' y='160' width='26' height='100'/><rect x='264' y='145' width='28' height='115'/>
</g>
<g fill='#ffd86b' opacity='.55'>
<rect x='54' y='132' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='64' y='150' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='202' y='150' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='240' y='176' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='270' y='160' width='5' height='6'/>
</g>
<!-- 도로 -->
<polygon points='0,400 0,300 300,300 300,400' fill='url(#road)'/>
<polygon points='150,300 138,400 162,400' fill='#cdd3e0' opacity='.25'/>
<!-- 1톤 트럭 (뒤) -->
<g transform='translate(176,232)'>
<rect x='0' y='14' width='86' height='46' rx='4' fill='#e9edf5'/>
<rect x='-30' y='20' width='34' height='40' rx='5' fill='#1a3a8a'/>
<rect x='-24' y='26' width='22' height='15' rx='2' fill='#9fb6e0'/>
<circle cx='-14' cy='66' r='9' fill='#222'/><circle cx='-14' cy='66' r='4' fill='#666'/>
<circle cx='58' cy='66' r='9' fill='#222'/><circle cx='58' cy='66' r='4' fill='#666'/>
<rect x='6' y='20' width='74' height='12' fill='#1a3a8a' opacity='.9'/>
<text x='42' y='30' font-size='9' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>HAEGWANG</text>
</g>
<!-- 주인공 박종찬: 정장 위에 작업점퍼, 결연 -->
<g transform='translate(150,250)'>
<!-- 몸통: 네이비 점퍼 + 골드 트림 -->
<path d='M-40 150 L-40 60 Q-40 36 -16 32 L16 32 Q40 36 40 60 L40 150 Z' fill='#15336f'/>
<path d='M-40 60 L-16 32 L-16 150 L-40 150 Z' fill='#0f2752'/>
<rect x='-3' y='34' width='6' height='116' fill='#d4a017' opacity='.85'/>
<path d='M-16 32 L0 70 L16 32 L8 30 L0 52 L-8 30 Z' fill='#fff'/>
<path d='M-3 34 L3 34 L0 54 Z' fill='#c0392b'/>
<!-- 목/머리 -->
<rect x='-9' y='14' width='18' height='22' rx='5' fill='#e9b486'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-4' r='26' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M-26 -8 Q-24 -34 0 -34 Q24 -34 26 -8 Q14 -22 0 -20 Q-14 -22 -26 -8 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M-20 -10 Q-22 -26 -4 -26' fill='none' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3'/>
<!-- 눈썹/눈 결연 -->
<path d='M-17 -6 q7 -4 13 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<path d='M4 -6 q6 -4 13 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-10' cy='2' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='11' cy='2' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<path d='M-6 14 q6 5 12 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<!-- 작업장갑 낀 손, 트럭 열쇠 -->
<g transform='translate(28,86)'><rect x='-8' y='-8' width='20' height='26' rx='7' fill='#1f2937'/><rect x='10' y='-2' width='5' height='3' fill='#cfcfcf'/><circle cx='20' cy='0' r='6' fill='none' stroke='#cfcfcf' stroke-width='3'/></g>
</g>
<!-- 타이틀 -->
<rect x='0' y='8' width='300' height='2' fill='#d4a017' opacity='.5'/>
<text x='150' y='52' font-size='30' fill='url(#gold)' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif' letter-spacing='-1'>해광그룹</text>
<text x='150' y='86' font-size='30' fill='#ffffff' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif' letter-spacing='-1'>막내아들</text>
<rect x='70' y='98' width='160' height='24' rx='12' fill='#c0392b'/>
<text x='150' y='115' font-size='13' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>화물 핸들을 잡다</text>
<text x='150' y='384' font-size='11' fill='#cdd7ea' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>몰락한 재벌, 1톤 트럭으로 다시 정상까지</text>
</svg>
